description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows) that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple Windows environments (2019 and 2022) with various build types (x64-Debug, x64-Release, etc.) and architectures (amd64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64). In each job, check out the repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure CMake, build the project, and optionally configure and build with Spectre mitigation.
